title: Front Office Manager - Leela Palaces - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Leela Palaces - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Leela Palaces are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Leela Palaces:
Leela Palaces is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces!
